name_en: 👄FENDI New Sunshine Fabric Handbag, printed with brown FF jacquard pattern and light brown leather FENDI ROMA lettering, with a hard leather handle. Features a spacious lined interior compartment, light brown leather edges, and gold-finished metal hardware. Can be carried with the double handle, and two internal hook clasps can be used to secure the shoulder strap. Model: FD8372, Dimensions: 40.5*21.5*35cm
